---
description: "Generate an SEO-optimized story category landing page for PaTan"
---

Create an SEO landing page for the **${category}** story category.

## Available Categories
- stories-of-hope
- gratitude-stories
- overcoming-adversity
- stories-of-transformation
- inspirational-testimonies
- personal-growth-stories
- healing-and-resilience

## Page Structure

### 1. SEO Meta
- Title: "{Category} | PaTan - Reflect • Inspire • Connect"
- Description: Compelling 150-160 char description
- Open Graph tags
- Canonical URL

### 2. Hero Section
- Category-specific headline
- Emotional supporting copy
- Primary CTA: "Explore {Category}"
- Secondary CTA: "Share Your Story"

### 3. Featured Stories
- 6 story preview cards from this category
- Loader to fetch from database

### 4. Category Description
- Why this category matters
- What readers can expect
- How stories in this category help

### 5. Related Categories
- 3 related category suggestions
- Horizontal card layout

### 6. CTA Section
- "Your story could be here"
- Account creation prompt

## Technical Requirements
- React-Router 7 route with loader
- TypeScript
- Tailwind with brand tokens
- WCAG 2.2 AA compliant
- Structured data (schema.org)
- Lazy loading for images

## Brand Voice
Stories are described as "illuminating", "transformative", "hopeful".
Never use "viral", "trending", "popular".
